meaning: n.(=hadji)赴麦加朝圣过的伊斯兰教徒
examples: For Haji Beardad, frail as he looks, is an important ally.
Back from the harvest, Haji Nursasih carries sacred red rice to the village of Sembalun Bumbung.
The Master, who was known to be quite uninterested in the miraculous, would never reply to questions on the Haji.
Dr Haji told the BBC she attributed the rise in SCD deaths to three factors.
Despite its heavy use Dr Haji says, exposure to tear gas is "massively under reported".
